summary: Domain-specific sync + SQLite store (screens/flows/app_versions/patterns/elements/junctions) powering bench/audit/drift; runs before the framework exit-code policy so it isn't skipped when the only flat-syncable resource (workspaces) needs auth.
reason: The framework sync only fills apps/resources; the analytics novels query Mobbin domain tables. Domain population is integrated into  and its row count counts toward a successful sync.
validated_outcome: Live sync populated 460 apps / 1832 screens / 229 patterns; bench/audit/drift read them.
